ZombieINC_Perk_Warcry_name,progression,,,,WarCry,戰吼
ZombieINC_Perk_Warcry_desc,progression,,,,"Born for war, you realize that while wearing heavy and noisy armor, you can attract zombies to yourself and assist your teammates. Shout out loud and draw the entire horde of zombies to you.",為戰爭而生，你意識到，當你穿著沉重而吵鬧的盔甲時，你可以吸引殭屍到自己身邊並協助你的隊友。大聲喊叫，將整群殭屍吸引到你身邊。
ZombieINC_Perk_Warcry1_LongDesc,progression,,,,"Requirement: Wear full set of heavy armor.\n\nPress F while with bare hands to shout and attract the zombies for 10 seconds, Cooldown of 8 minutes. The shout's buff adds to you 10% base pain tolerance, but slows you by 30%. The more teammates are in your squad more motivated you become and adds 3% more pain tolerance per member. [FF0000]Permanently become more noisy and zombies will see you more easily[-]","要求：穿戴全套重甲。 
 
 徒手按F鍵大喊大叫，吸引殭屍，持續10秒，冷卻時間8分鐘。呼喊的增益使你增加 10% 的基礎疼痛耐受力，但會減慢你 30% 的速度。隊伍中的隊友越多，你的積極性就會越高，每位成員的疼痛耐受力增加 3%。 [FF0000] 永久變得更吵鬧，殭屍會更容易看到你[-]"
ZombieINC_Perk_Warcry2_LongDesc,progression,,,,"Requirement: Wear full set of heavy armor.\n\nPress F while with bare hands to shout and attract the zombies for 20 seconds, Cooldown of 4 minutes. The shout's buff adds to you 20% base pain tolerance, but slows you by 30%. The more teammates are in your squad more motivated you become and adds 4% more pain tolerance per member. [FF0000]Permanently become more noisy and zombies will see you more easily[-]","要求：穿戴全套重甲。 
 
 徒手按F鍵大喊大叫，吸引殭屍，持續20秒，冷卻時間4分鐘。呼喊的增益使你增加 20% 的基礎疼痛耐受力，但會減慢你 30% 的速度。隊伍中的隊友越多，你的積極性就會越高，每位成員的疼痛耐受力增加 4%。 [FF0000] 永久變得更吵鬧，殭屍會更容易看到你[-]"

The shout's buff adds to you 30% base pain tolerance, but slows you by 30%. The more teammates are in your squad more motivated you become and adds 5% more pain tolerance per member. [FF0000]Permanently become more noisy and zombies will see you more easily[-]","要求：穿戴全套重甲。

ZombieINC_challenge_AK47_description,Quests,Quest Info,,x,"[Unique Weapon Mission] This information is valuable. Greg, one of our most reliable scouts, witnessed a group of bandits zombies carrying Special AKs. He mentioned that these weapons were customized by the bandits themselves, using different materials for the barrel, springs, chambers—everything. While they may look normal from the outside, internally, they are remarkable. I'm not sure if any single weapon is still functioning correctly, so gather all the parts you can and bring them to me. I'll assemble them for you.",[獨特武器任務]這個資訊很有價值。格雷格是我們最可靠的偵察兵之一，他目睹了一群攜帶特種 AK 的土匪殭屍。他提到，這些武器是土匪自己訂製的，槍管、彈簧、槍膛等都使用了不同的材料。雖然他們的外表看起來很平常，但從內部來看，他們卻是非凡的。我不確定是否有任何武器仍然可以正常工作，所以收集你能收集到的所有零件並將它們帶給我。我會為你組裝它們。

 1°您將有 20 分鐘的時間來完成任務。 
 
 2°：只有在潛行狀態下並使用所提供的手槍時，擊殺才有效。 
 
 提示：當您隱藏時，會有一個符號指示。"

ZombieINC_Introduction1Part2,Quest,Quest Info,,,"Continuing to part 2...\n\nJust To recap the previous information. To keep track of the bosses that have killed, a [DECEA3]New Progression Quest[-] was add. A New Boss is unlocked when this quest is finished.\n\n[DECEA3]New Perks:[-] Different perks were added distributed within the attributes with a new progression requirement. Boss Score is a new requirement for the apocalyptic perks. Obtain boss score by delivering the death blow to the bosses. Tier 1 bosses grant 1 Boss Score, Tier 2 grants 2, and so on...\nAlso Bosses are splited in normal ones and Infested Versions. Normal bosses are distributed between Tier 1 and 5 Quests. Infested Versions are only Tier 6 and grants 1 boss infested score. They are way more powerful, with diferent visuals and new attacks compared with it's normal version.\n\n[DECEA3]New Magazine:[-] You can Obtain this new magazine as a reward from hunt missions.\n\nThe diferent types of mission will be presented on part 3...","繼續第 2 部分... 
 
 只是回顧一下前面的信息。為了追蹤已殺死的 Boss，新增了[DECEA3]新進度任務[-]。當這個任務完成後，一個新的首領就會被解鎖。 
 
 [DECEA3] 新福利： [-] 新增了不同的福利，分佈在具有新進度要求的屬性中。 Boss 分數是世界末日福利的新要求。透過給老闆致命一擊來獲得老闆分數。第 1 層 Boss 授予 1 個 Boss 分數，第 2 層授予 2 個 Boss 分數，依此類推... 
 此外，Boss 分為普通版本和 Infested 版本。普通 Boss 分佈在 1 級和 5 級任務之間。 Infested 版本僅為 6 級，並授予 1 個 Boss Infested 分數。與普通版本相比，它們更加強大，具有不同的視覺效果和新的攻擊方式。 
 
 [DECEA3]新雜誌：[-]您可以透過狩獵任務獲得這本新雜誌作為獎勵。 
 
 不同類型的任務將在第 3 部分介紹..."
